# Florida Impact Shield
# https://floridaimpactshield.com
# Last updated: June 2026

## About
Florida Impact Shield is Florida's premier hurricane impact window and door installation company. Licensed CBC contractor. My Safe Florida Home (MSFH) approved. Serving all 67 Florida counties since 2018.

## Services
- Hurricane impact window installation
- Impact door installation
- Sliding glass door replacement
- Hurricane garage door installation
- Wind mitigation inspections (OIR-B1-1802)
- My Safe Florida Home grant assistance — up to $10,000
- 0% financing options

## Key Benefits
- Save up to 45% on Florida homeowners insurance
- Miami-Dade NOA certified protection
- Home security — prevents break-ins
- Energy savings — 20-30% cooling cost reduction
- UV protection — blocks 99% of UV rays
- Noise reduction — up to 40dB
- Increases home value 5-10%

## Service Areas
All 67 Florida counties including: Miami-Dade, Broward, Palm Beach, Lee, Hillsborough, Orange, Duval, Sarasota, Pinellas, Volusia, Brevard, St. Lucie, Martin, Indian River, Escambia, Leon, Alachua, and more.
